me.heading: IT'S ME 0-0
me.subtitle: WISDOM IN NONSENSE
me.body: Welcome! My name is Tap KunvaD. I'm a believer that you can find wisdom in nonsense. Here, I share a blend of my personal interests and my 12-year journey in fashion retail.

hi.heading: HI THERE
hi.body: Thanks for stopping by. Feel free to reach out — always happy to connect over nonsense.
